member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Internals.Utils.JSModuleFactory
member.summary: Creates instances scoped to the BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns content root.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Internals.Utils.JSModuleFactory.Create(System.Func{Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a for the specified module path relative to the BuiltIns content root.
member.param: A factory that returns the instance to use.
The path to the JavaScript module, relative to the BuiltIns content root.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanel
member.summary: A panel that displays a log of component event callback invocations captured during story interaction.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanel.Story
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently displayed story, used to detect story switches and clear the log.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanel.ActionLogs
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of captured action log entries to display.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanel.ActionLogsChanged
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback invoked when the list changes.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanel.OnComponentAction(BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionEventArgs)
member.summary: Receives a component action event dispatched from JavaScript and prepends it to the action log.
member.param: The event arguments containing the action name and serialized arguments.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanelAddon
member.summary: Registers the Actions panel and its preview decorator with the addon builder.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanelAddon.Initialize(BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder)
member.summary: Registers the and with the provided builder.
member.param: The addon builder used to register panels and decorators.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanelLogLine
member.summary: Renders a single action log entry in the Actions panel, with support for expanding nested JSON objects and arrays.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanelLogLine.Repeat
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of consecutive times this action has been repeated.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanelLogLine.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the action or property being displayed.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanelLogLine.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the JSON value to render for this log line.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanelPreviewDecorator
member.summary: A preview decorator that intercepts component event callbacks and dispatches them as action events for the Actions panel to display.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanelPreviewDecorator.Story
member.summary: Gets or sets the current story whose event callbacks will be intercepted for action logging.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanelPreviewDecorator.EventTArgMonitorHandler``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Handles a generic event callback invocation by serializing the arguments and dispatching the action event to the Actions panel.
member.param: The name of the event callback parameter.
The event arguments to serialize and dispatch.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ActionsPanelTags
member.summary: Provides shared render fragments used to display separators and JSON values in the Actions panel.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionEventArgs
member.summary: Holds the data for a component action event captured in the Actions panel.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionEventArgs.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the event callback that was invoked.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionEventArgs.ArgsJson
member.summary: Gets the JSON-serialized representation of the event arguments.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionLog
member.summary: Represents a single logged entry in the Actions panel for a component event callback invocation.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionLog.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for this log entry.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionLog.Name
member.summary: The name of the event callback that was invoked.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionLog.ArgsJson
member.summary: The raw JSON string of the event arguments, or "void" for parameterless callbacks.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionLog.Repeat
member.summary: The number of consecutive times this same action has been logged.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionLog.ArgsJsonElement
member.summary: The parsed of the event arguments for display purposes.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.ComponentActionLog.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with the given name and JSON arguments.
member.param: The name of the invoked event callback.
The JSON-serialized arguments, or "void" for parameterless callbacks.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.JsonFallbackConverter`1
member.summary: A that gracefully handles unsupported types and cyclic references by writing a descriptive string instead of throwing.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.JsonFallbackConverter`1.Read(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader@,System.Type,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Read is not supported; always throws .

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.JsonFallbackConverter`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Stack{System.Object})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with an optional shared visited-object stack for cyclic-reference tracking.
member.param: An existing stack of visited objects to detect cycles, or null to create a new one.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.JsonFallbackConverter`1.Write(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter,`0,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Serializes to JSON, substituting unsupported or cyclic values with a descriptive fallback string.
member.param: The writer to serialize into.
The value to serialize.
The serializer options in effect.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.JsonFallbackConverter`1.PrepareJsonSerializerOptions(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions,System.Type)
member.summary: Returns a instance augmented with a for the given value type if it is a plain object type.
member.param: The base serializer options to extend.
The runtime type of the value being serialized.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.JsonFallbackConverter`1.IsUnsupportedType(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified type cannot be meaningfully serialized (e.g., delegates, expressions, or event callbacks).
member.param: The type to test.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.JsonFallbackSerializer
member.summary: Provides methods for serializing objects to JSON without any exceptions even when the object contains unsupported types or cyclic references.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Actions.JsonFallbackSerializer.Serialize``1(``0,System.Action{System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions})
member.summary:
Serializes the specified object to a JSON string.
If the property value is an unsupported type, the property value is serialized as a string that indicates the type is unsupported.
The cyclic references are detected and serialized as a string that indicates the cyclic references are not supported.
member.typeparam: The type of the object to serialize.
member.param: The object to serialize.
An optional action to configure the .
member.returns: A JSON string representation of the object.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanel
member.summary: A panel that renders interactive input controls for each parameter of the currently displayed story.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanel.Story
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently displayed story whose parameters are rendered as controls.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanel.ViewMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the current view mode, used to determine whether to show extended parameter details.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanel.GetParameters
member.summary: Get parameters of the component from the current story.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanel.GetKey(BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter)
member.summary: Returns a stable key string for the given parameter, combining the story navigation path and parameter name.
member.param: The component parameter to compute a key for.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanel.GetArgumentValue(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the current argument value for the specified parameter name from the story context.
member.param: The name of the parameter whose current argument value is requested.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanel.ResetControls
member.summary: Resets all story arguments back to their default values.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanel.OnInputAsync(System.Object,BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter)
member.summary: Updates the story argument for the given parameter with the supplied value.
member.param: The new value to apply.
The component parameter being updated.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanelAddon
member.summary: Registers the Controls panel and its preview decorator with the addon builder.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanelAddon.Initialize(BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder)
member.summary: Registers the and with the provided builder.
member.param: The addon builder used to register panels and decorators.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanelPreviewDecorator
member.summary: A preview decorator that applies URL argument values to the story context when the Args cascading parameter changes.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanelPreviewDecorator.Story
member.summary: Gets or sets the current story whose context will be updated from URL args.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ControlsPanelPreviewDecorator.Args
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL-encoded argument key-value pairs to apply to the story context.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.ArrayParameterController
member.summary: A parameter controller that renders an editable list UI for array and list parameters, supporting string, bool, numeric, and enum element types.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.BoolParameterController
member.summary: A parameter controller that renders a toggle button (and optional null radio) for boolean parameters.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.EnumParameterController
member.summary: A parameter controller that renders a select dropdown or radio group for enum parameters.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.NumberParameterController
member.summary: A parameter controller that renders a numeric text input for number parameters.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.ParameterControllerBase
member.summary: Base class for all parameter controller components, providing common parameters and an input notification helper.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.ParameterControllerBase.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique key used to identify this controller instance.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.ParameterControllerBase.Parameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the component parameter metadata this controller is bound to.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.ParameterControllerBase.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the current value of the parameter.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.ParameterControllerBase.OnInput
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback invoked when the user changes the parameter value.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.ParameterControllerBase.OnInputAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Invokes the callback with the supplied value wrapped in a .
member.param: The new value to report.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.RenderFragmentParameterController
member.summary: A parameter controller that renders a text area for parameters.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.Controllers.TextParameterController
member.summary: A parameter controller that renders a text area or color picker for string parameters depending on the control type.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.ParameterController
member.summary: Selects and renders the appropriate parameter controller component based on the parameter's type.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.ParameterController.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique key identifying this controller instance.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.ParameterController.Parameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the component parameter metadata used to select and configure the appropriate controller.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.ParameterController.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the current value of the parameter.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.ParameterController.OnInput
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback invoked when the user changes the parameter value.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.ParameterInputEventArgs
member.summary: Carries the new value and associated parameter metadata when a control input changes.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.ParameterInputEventArgs.Value
member.summary: The new value entered by the user.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.ParameterInputEventArgs.Parameter
member.summary: The component parameter whose control was changed.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Panel.Controls.ParameterControllers.ParameterInputEventArgs.#ctor(System.Object,BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with the supplied value and parameter.
member.param: The new value provided by the user.
The component parameter associated with the input event.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Background.BackgroundAddon
member.summary: Registers the Background toolbar content and its preview decorator with the addon builder.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Background.BackgroundAddon.Initialize(BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder)
member.summary: Registers and with the provided builder.
member.param: The addon builder used to register toolbar content and decorators.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Background.BackgroundPreviewDecorator
member.summary: A preview decorator that applies the selected background color to the story canvas via JavaScript.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Background.BackgroundPreviewDecorator.Globals
member.summary: Gets or sets the global arguments dictionary, used to read the selected background color.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Background.BackgroundToolbarContent
member.summary: Toolbar content that provides a popup menu for selecting the story canvas background color.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Background.BackgroundToolbarContent.Globals
member.summary: Gets the global arguments used to store and propagate the selected background color.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.ChangeSizeAddon
member.summary: Registers the Change Size toolbar content with the addon builder.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.ChangeSizeAddon.Initialize(BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder)
member.summary: Registers with the provided builder.
member.param: The addon builder used to register toolbar content.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.ChangeSizeToolbarContent
member.summary: Toolbar content that provides a popup menu for selecting a predefined viewport size and orientation for the story canvas.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.ChangeSizeToolbarContent.Globals
member.summary: Gets the global arguments used to store and propagate the selected viewport size state.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.Orientation
member.summary: Specifies the screen orientation applied to the story canvas viewport.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.Orientation.Portrait
member.summary: The viewport is taller than it is wide.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.Orientation.Landscape
member.summary: The viewport is wider than it is tall.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.SizeType
member.summary: Identifies the predefined viewport size preset for the story canvas.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.SizeType.None
member.summary: No size constraint; the canvas uses its natural size.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.SizeType.SmallMobile
member.summary: Small mobile preset (320 x 568).

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.SizeType.LargeMobile
member.summary: Large mobile preset (414 x 896).

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.ChangeSize.SizeType.Tablet
member.summary: Tablet preset (834 x 1112).

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Grid.GridAddon
member.summary: Registers the Grid toolbar content and its preview decorator with the addon builder.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Grid.GridAddon.Initialize(BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder)
member.summary: Registers and with the provided builder.
member.param: The addon builder used to register toolbar content and decorators.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Grid.GridPreviewDecorator
member.summary: A preview decorator that conditionally applies the background-grid stylesheet to the story canvas.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Grid.GridPreviewDecorator.Globals
member.summary: Gets or sets the global arguments dictionary, used to read whether the background grid is enabled.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Grid.GridToolbarContent
member.summary: Toolbar content that provides a toggle button for enabling or disabling the background grid overlay on the story canvas.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Grid.GridToolbarContent.Globals
member.summary: Gets the global arguments used to store and propagate the grid-enabled state.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasureAddon
member.summary: Registers the Measure toolbar content and its preview decorator with the addon builder.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasureAddon.Initialize(BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder)
member.summary: Registers and with the provided builder.
member.param: The addon builder used to register toolbar content and decorators.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator
member.summary: A preview decorator that renders visual overlays showing the box-model dimensions (content area, padding, and margin) of hovered elements.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.Globals
member.summary: Gets or sets the global arguments dictionary, used to read whether element measurement is enabled.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.DOMRect
member.summary: Represents the position and size of a DOM element's bounding rectangle.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.DOMRect.X
member.summary: Gets or sets the x-coordinate of the rectangle's left edge.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.DOMRect.Y
member.summary: Gets or sets the y-coordinate of the rectangle's top edge.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.DOMRect.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the rectangle.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.DOMRect.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of the rectangle.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.DOMRect.Empty
member.summary: An empty with all fields set to zero.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.SpacingSize
member.summary: Represents the four-sided spacing (top, right, bottom, left) of a CSS box-model property.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.SpacingSize.Top
member.summary: Gets or sets the top spacing value.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.SpacingSize.Left
member.summary: Gets or sets the left spacing value.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.SpacingSize.Bottom
member.summary: Gets or sets the bottom spacing value.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.SpacingSize.Right
member.summary: Gets or sets the right spacing value.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.Measurement
member.summary: Contains the boundary rectangle, padding, and margin measurements for a hovered DOM element.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.Measurement.Boundary
member.summary: Gets or sets the element's bounding rectangle including padding.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.Measurement.Padding
member.summary: Gets or sets the computed padding sizes of the element.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.Measurement.Margin
member.summary: Gets or sets the computed margin sizes of the element.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.TargetElementChanged(BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasurePreviewDecorator.Measurement)
member.summary: Called from JavaScript when the hovered target element changes; updates the measurement overlay styles.
member.param: The new measurement data for the hovered element, or null if no element is targeted.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasureToolbarContent
member.summary: Toolbar content that provides a toggle button for enabling or disabling the element-measurement overlay on the story canvas.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Measure.MeasureToolbarContent.Globals
member.summary: Gets the global arguments used to store and propagate the measure-enabled state.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Outlines.OutlinesAddon
member.summary: Registers the Outlines toolbar content and its preview decorator with the addon builder.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Outlines.OutlinesAddon.Initialize(BlazingStory.Addons.IAddonBuilder)
member.summary: Registers and with the provided builder.
member.param: The addon builder used to register toolbar content and decorators.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Outlines.OutlinesPreviewDecorator
member.summary: A preview decorator that conditionally applies the outlines stylesheet to visually highlight element boundaries on the story canvas.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Outlines.OutlinesPreviewDecorator.Globals
member.summary: Gets or sets the global arguments dictionary, used to read whether the outlines overlay is enabled.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Outlines.OutlinesToolbarContent
member.summary: Toolbar content that provides a toggle button for enabling or disabling CSS outlines on elements within the story canvas.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Addons.BuiltIns.Toolbar.Outlines.OutlinesToolbarContent.Globals
member.summary: Gets the global arguments used to store and propagate the outlines-enabled state.
